# Spec Summary (Lite)

Layer optional AI-powered features onto AntarMind AI's deterministic foundation: embedding-based semantic similarity detection for past thoughts, browser-native voice-to-text input via the Web Speech API, personalized behavioral recommendations, cognitive bias detection (catastrophizing, overgeneralizing), cross-domain correlation insights, full-text thought search via `GET /api/thoughts/search`, and personal data export as CSV or JSON. All AI features are opt-in and gracefully degrade when external services are unavailable.
